name: Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch pastry-lined pan or pie plate.
3. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce the temperature to 300 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 50 to 60 minutes, until set.
5. Cool completely.
6. Top with whipped cream before serving.
